purpose: Track the current crack chain reaction as a dependency graph so implementation can fix roots first and avoid patching symptoms in the wrong order.

root_cause_nodes.summary: Private full-real activation exists as policy intent, but its schema is shallow, its validator does not run schema validation, and no focused pytest covers it.
fix_prerequisites: Define exact nested activation schema semantics.
Add focused activation positive and negative tests.
Run jsonschema validation before custom semantic checks.

root_cause_nodes.summary: VBT tool schemas/modules, VBT642 builder, VBT642 validator, and tool preflight all treat no-runtime as the only valid mode instead of a catalog_reference mode.
fix_prerequisites: Introduce explicit mode field with catalog_reference and activated_private_runtime states.
Keep existing fail-closed tests for catalog_reference mode.
Add activated-mode fixtures that require activation, source acquisition, resource policy, and receipt refs.

root_cause_nodes.summary: source_registry readiness fields and source_acquisition_policy live/historical flags are accepted in contradictory combinations, and source registry lacks direct schema/contract/validator refs for current acquisition semantics.
fix_prerequisites: Define live readiness versus historical readiness explicitly.
Bind current source registry schema/contract/validator refs.
Add negative tests for contradictory readiness/acquisition fields.

root_cause_nodes.summary: Existing validators pass each surface in isolation, but none validates private activation against source acquisition, VBT642, VBT tools, MCP runtime helper policy, tool preflight, and tests as one coherent overlay.
fix_prerequisites: Create additive overlay policy/schema/contract instead of weakening catalog-only surfaces directly.
The overlay validator must load every dependent policy and report conflicts with exact paths.
Do not claim production readiness from overlay success.

root_cause_nodes.summary: Some validators/builders mutate artifacts in summary-only or routine flows, and repo-index freshness can look stale because generated index artifacts changed.
fix_prerequisites: Classify status-only stale generated artifacts as evidence, not blockers.
Route tests that rebuild artifacts to tmp_path or read-only fixtures.

root_cause_nodes.summary: VBT642 queue names, risk flags, and ranked build metadata are useful planning evidence but currently easy to misread as one-to-one lane authority or as active risk enforcement.
fix_prerequisites: Add queue metadata for source area, dependency expansion, and queue construction rule.
Promote selected risk flags into operator-decision or overlay-required status.
Update query output labels so area_count and queue_count are distinct.

fix_waves.name: audit_hygiene_and_tracking
fix_waves.goal: Keep all crack reports valid, secret-clean, and organized before implementation.

fix_waves.name: activation_policy_schema_validator_tests
fix_waves.goal: Make private full-real activation enforceable and tested before downstream tools honor it.
must_not_do: Do not weaken secret redaction requirements.
Do not treat activation success as production readiness.

fix_waves.name: source_registry_acquisition_semantics
fix_waves.goal: Make live/historical source acquisition easy while making field meanings unambiguous.
must_not_do: Do not make fixture parity a prerequisite for research acquisition if the acquisition policy says it is evidence for promotion only.
Do not delete or re-root source data.
validation: live source promotion mocked positive path
production data pull rule sheet tests

fix_waves.name: private_runtime_research_overlay_validator
fix_waves.goal: Create the missing cross-policy validator without weakening catalog-reference validators.
must_not_do: Do not mark broker/live production behavior ready.
validation: overlay negative fixtures for missing activation, source acquisition mismatch, VBT642 mode conflict, VBT tool mode conflict, MCP precedence conflict, and receipt-policy missing

fix_waves.name: vbt642_mode_aware_matrix_and_tests
fix_waves.goal: Preserve catalog-reference matrix while adding an activated runtime overlay or mode-aware generated output.
must_not_do: Do not change catalog_reference tests to accept runtime true.
Do not make risk_flags decorative once overlay mode exists.
validation: query smoke for top100, top300, runtime-sensitive, operator-decision, topology queue metadata

fix_waves.name: vbt_tool_boundary_shared_helper
fix_waves.goal: Remove repeated no-runtime semantics from 25 static VBT tool schemas/modules by adding a shared mode-aware boundary helper.
must_not_do: Do not hand-edit one tool and leave the others semantically different.
Do not allow runtime writes without receipt and output route authority.
validation: activated mode tests for selected Data, Portfolio, and optimizer surfaces

fix_waves.name: mcp_and_knowledge_runtime_precedence_tests
fix_waves.goal: Align MCP runtime helper precedence with private activation and overlay validator expectations.
must_not_do: Do not persist private endpoint URLs or tokens.
Do not default-enable run_code runtime helpers.
validation: MCP gated runtime positive test with activation refs
MCP missing-receipt or missing-boundary negative tests

fix_waves.name: read_only_and_index_status_cleanup
fix_waves.goal: Reduce false workflow blockers from stale generated outputs and summary-only mutations.
must_not_do: Do not hide real missing/corrupt index states.
Do not rewrite committed artifacts from read-only tests.
validation: summary-only commands leave git diff unchanged for owned outputs
repo-index status distinguishes non-blocking generated freshness from missing/corrupt index

implementation_rules: Fix roots before symptoms: activation schema/tests first, source semantics second, overlay validator third, then VBT642/VBT tools.
Use additive mode-aware surfaces before mutating protected catalog-only semantics.
Every activated runtime allowance must cite activation policy, source acquisition policy when data is involved, topology/resource policy, receipt policy, and output route authority.
Private research success is not production readiness.
No secret values or tokenized private docs endpoints may be written to repo artifacts.
stop_conditions_for_drilling: Every P1 crack maps to exactly one root cause and one fix wave.
Every fix wave has at least one focused positive and one focused negative validation path.
No validator named repo-wide or overlay-wide passes without loading all surfaces it claims to reconcile.
Source acquisition fields have non-overlapping live and historical semantics.
VBT642 and VBT tool surfaces can represent both catalog_reference and activated_private_runtime without weakening catalog mode.
Summary-only and read-only commands do not mutate committed artifacts.

current_bottom_status.reason: The crack graph is sufficient to begin root-cause fixes, but the audit has not yet inspected every generated builder/test pair after these roots. Additional drilling should continue in parallel with wave 1 and wave 2 implementation.

next_drill_layers.focus: source acquisition implementation paths and mocked positive live/historical pull receipts
VBT tool shared-boundary migration plan across all 25 static tool surfaces
read-only/index status cleanup and mutation-free validator inventory
